utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , I can not tell you how great it was to look at the crowd and see your face !

emotion_cause.span: 2_how great it was to look at the crowd and see your face !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I mean ... uh , did you know you were mouthing the words along with me ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_you were mouthing the words along with me

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , it is ok ! Made me feel like a rock star !

emotion_cause.span: 3_you were mouthing the words along with me

utterances.speaker: Charlie
utterances.text: Oh my God ! I am your groupie !

emotion_cause.span: 5_Made me feel like a rock star !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I would better not found you naked in my hotel room !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , I took it too far !
